summary: Stream 4: Full testing of milestone model (3 families) + project_dependencies CRUD + frontend MilestoneModal + Roadmap filters. All backend tests passed (14/14). Frontend UI and integration fully functional.

issues: NOTE (not a bug): svg polygon count includes legend diamonds (always shows all family colors). Actual project-bar filtering IS correct — only epic_milestone violet diamonds remain on bars after filter. Filter reduces governance diamonds from 23 to ~2 visible on bars.

critical_code_review_comments: Roadmap milestonesByProject logic: when no filter is active, only is_governance milestones are shown (backward compat). When any filter is active, all matching milestones are shown. This is intentional but could be surprising to end users.
Backend milestone validation: attribute field is silently nullified for READ_ONLY viewers instead of returning 400 — acceptable but could be more explicit.
seed_data_creation: Test created/deleted milestones and dependencies during test run (auto-cleanup in test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stream 4 fully tested and working. Backend: milestones CRUD with 3 families (epic_lifecycle/epic_milestone/transversal), family/type validation, 403 for READ_ONLY. Project dependencies CRUD with enriched names. Frontend: MilestoneModal with 3 family cards + filtered type dropdown, JALONS section in ProjectDetail with colored family labels + critical border, DÉPENDANCES INTER-PROJETS section. Roadmap: double filter bar (PROJETS + JALONS), SVG polygons colored by family (#EAB308/#8B5CF6/#10B981), 6 SVG dependency arrows (strokeDasharray), deps toggle hides arrows, family/attribute/blocking filters working.
